entities.name: MALI
entities.description: Country in Africa where the study on crop diversification and food security was conducted

entities.name: BAMAKO
entities.description: Urban center in Mali used for comparison of food quality

entities.name: CROP DIVERSIFICATION
entities.description: The practice of increasing the variety of crops grown to improve food and nutrition security

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: NUTRITION SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of nutritious food to meet dietary needs

entities.name: CEREALS
entities.description: Basic commodities or staple crops that often dominate diets in Mali

entities.name: MILLET
entities.description: A staple crop used in various diversification strategies in Mali

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A staple crop used in various diversification strategies in Mali

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A staple crop used in various diversification strategies in Mali

entities.name: COWPEA
entities.description: A staple crop used in various diversification strategies in Mali

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A staple crop used in various diversification strategies in Mali

entities.name: MULTINOMIAL LOGISTIC REGRESSION
entities.description: Statistical method used to estimate the determinants of crop diversification

entities.name: SIMPSON DIVERSITY INDEX
entities.description: Index used to determine the level of crop diversification

entities.name: CONSUMPTION SCORE INDEX
entities.description: Index weighted by consumption frequency used to assess the nutritional status of households

entities.name: ANTHROPOMETRIC INDICES
entities.description: Indices used to assess the nutritional status of children aged 6-48 months

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL INSECURITY
entities.description: A situation where individuals or households lack sufficient nutrition, affecting 30% of the surveyed population

entities.name: SOCIOECONOMIC FACTORS
entities.description: Factors that have a positive influence on the adoption of crop diversification

entities.name: SMART FOOD CAMPAIGN
entities.description: Initiative aimed at strengthening the resilience and nutritional situation of households
